revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:ja>Zmblelra]], [[User:ja>匿名パルチザン]], [[User:220.210.146.96]], [[User:ja>天照天灯]], [[User:ja>こやまひろ]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ama-no-iwafune here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
